mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document_collaborators (document_id, user_id, permission, status, created_at) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{userId}, #{permission}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM document_collaborators WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE document_collaborators SET permission = #{permission} WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE document_collaborators SET status = #{status} WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM document_collaborators WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND user_id = #{userId}
